html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Teresa’s shedding has stayed active because long‑term stress and medication changes are still present. This protocol meets her exactly where she is—helping her calm the stress loop, anchor deep sleep, and rebuild iron and nutrient reserves so recovery can finally take hold. In the stabilization phase, the goal is to steady shedding and strengthen the new baby hairs already showing. Each small, steady action brings her closer to dependable regrowth and real peace of mind 🌱.

Stay consistent—these daily anchors turn stabilization into visible regrowth.
